Author: tdextrous
Content: Without knowing any additional details, this sounds like it could be latch up. Does your design have sufficient well taps and substrate taps throughout the layout? Or are these included in the standard cells?

Author: tholin
Content: They are included with the standard cells

Author: namibj
Content: I guess the epoxy isn't transparent to thermal IR? You could otherwise maybe use a macro lens on a thermal camera to hunt for it

Author: namibj
Content: Well, my offer of trying to reproduce in Xyce if it happens static from POR or external reset/reset-release after POR, does still stand.

Author: tholin
Content: The resistors in the R2R are small, requiring a buf_12 cell to drive and I have 11 DACs on here

Author: tholin
Content: But I thought I wired each design that uses a DAC to send all 0s into the DAC when held in reset, to reduce the static power consumption to near zero

Author: tholin
Content: But after checking with a multimeter, at least 4 of the analog outputs generate a non-zero voltage in reset
